intro: Over the past two weeks, ZCyberNews has published 19 articles on threat intelligence, covering activity from GopherWhisper and LockBit. The reporting spans April 13 to April 25, 2026, with a severity mix of eight informational, eight high, and one medium alerts. Affected sectors include government, technology, critical-infrastructure, cybersecurity, and defense, while regions impacted are Asia, Europe, Global, North America, and the United Kingdom.
